body:
| |
---
# _Jobless claims drop 5,000 to 210,000 in mid-October, stick near 50-year low_
“The number of Americans losing their jobs and applying for unemployment benefits each week remained near a 49-year low in mid-October,” Jeffry Bartash reports for _MarketWatch_. “It can’t get a whole lot better in the U.S. job market. Openings just hit a record high, the U.S. unemployment rate has fallen to a 48-year low of 3.7% and hiring remains robust.” The strong demand for American labor is pushing up wages and benefits, as well, fueling the longest economic expansion in U.S. history, Bartash adds. **[Click here to continue Molly

name: Team Sisolak
subject: Joe's coming!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GvpUK9woMU1Eoo-3slyoco43HAufzhDDHq5cQh1zXEE=/f5iU_9zcZaytK8L9C4tH9-7i3S0jUQO0CMbgq4GQtrs=?gpsid=37_57_4547&refcode=em18_181019_VPinNV_LG_fnd_gq_nopn__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181019_VPinNV_LG_fnd_gq_nopn__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
Friend,

We're so excited to have Joe Biden's support. And we're excited to announce that he's coming to Nevada this weekend!

Our former vice president will be here because he knows this race is as close as they come, and he understands how much is at stake.

A few thousand votes, or even a few hundred, could make all the difference between health insurance coverage or bankruptcy for hundreds of thousands of Nevadans with pre-existing conditions. Between basic rights and equality for women or more discrimination. Between a future where our kids succeed and our educators don't have to hold down part-time jobs on top of teaching -- or a budget crisis that makes things worse.

**[Please chip in $3 to help get people to the polls and elect Steve.](https://act.myngp.com/el/GvpUK9woMU1Eoo-3slyoco43HAufzhDDHq5cQh1zXEE=/f5iU_9zcZaytK8L9C4tH9-7i3S0jUQO0CMbgq4GQtrs=?gpsid=37_57_4547&refcode=em18_181019_VPinNV_L1_fnd_gq_nopn__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181019_VPinNV_L1_fnd_gq_nopn__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Team Sisolak
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/GvpUK9woMU1Eoo-3slyoco43HAufzhDDHq5cQh1zXEE=/f5iU_9zcZaytK8L9C4tH9-7i3S0jUQO0CMbgq4GQtrs=?gpsid=37_57_4547&refcode=em18_181019_VPinNV_B1_fnd_gq_nopn__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181019_VPinNV_B1_fnd_gq_nopn__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Joe Biden
Date: Thurs, Oct 10, 2018
Subject: I am endorsing Steve
---
Friend,

I love visiting Nevada. The people, the energy, the culture -- there are few other states quite like it. And there are very few candidates who reflect this state's values like Steve. That is why I am proud to endorse Steve Sisolak for Governor.

I am proud to support Steve because he's not only right on the issues, but he's also my kind of candidate. He comes from a blue-collar background, knows the value of hard work, and is all about standing up for families. That's how I know he'll put the interests of working Nevadans first.

**[Will you please consider supporting my friend Steve with a contribution to his campaign today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/GvpUK9woMU1Eoo-3slyoco43HAufzhDDHq5cQh1zXEE=/f5iU_9zcZaytK8L9C4tH9-7i3S0jUQO0CMbgq4GQtrs=?gpsid=37_57_4547&refcode=em18_181019_VPinNV_L2_fnd_gq_nopn__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181019_VPinNV_L2_fnd_gq_nopn__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Steve knows the challenges that come with trying to make payroll and with raising a family as a single dad. Steve's experience and vision make him the best choice for the Silver State. He will focus on improving public education, protecting Medicaid expansion, and creating good jobs across the state. I hope Nevadans will join me in supporting him on Election Day.

**[Please consider making a contribution to Steve today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/GvpUK9woMU1Eoo-3slyoco43HAufzhDDHq5cQh1zXEE=/f5iU_9zcZaytK8L9C4tH9-7i3S0jUQO0CMbgq4GQtrs=?gpsid=37_57_4547&refcode=em18_181019_VPinNV_L3_fnd_gq_nopn__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181019_VPinNV_L3_fnd_gq_nopn__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

---
Joe Biden

name: Jason Yates
subject: Christians' Role in the Public Square
body:
| |
---
| Peter, I’m excited to share with you our latest Newsletter. Our friends, Rev. Sammy Rodriguez, Pastor J.D. Greear, and My Faith Votes Honorary National Chairman Mike Huckabee, have written some insightful pieces for the times we are living in. **In this issue:**
* [Four Myths About Christian Political Engagement](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNJZ_BWixTgWQoBFQN5Eb8ZDgP-hu6or3DUHh-CYQ_tZuW5LqMxPQKElnZvCONT10VH-BRnXJvHh9YZLfY585y8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=181019news01&n=1) – by Pastor J.D. Greear
* [Reconciling The Central Tension of the Immigration Debate](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvMvlHMBnb4oP8RyQO6IdqcapS-WUr_PT_pBv8g9xgS99UNMfBIXn4iTE0Kdt_hbqHa24WFRP22esUG7bu1PCEp6WiA_b-TSFwWat7icf_mzOQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=181019news01&n=2) – by Rev. Samuel Rodriguez
* [How to Respond to Media Bias](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPQbMissRD2xCDS-jAm3qJuUb1aEvjzK-q8-lRiJ0v1njmFVi5zYRtGTnNV37SDk_4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=181019news01&n=3) – by Governor Mike Huckabee

These are essential articles to creating conversations about important topics, and they are valuable resources to share with your friends. It’s so critical that we have a dialogue with others about what it looks like to bring our faith to the public square. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRW3we3u8oKwtxLPg1pS-XO91zL_ueHW-6ol0s7MzBW2A6mioyZfxvJ3OdOV9R_YZg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=181019news01&n=4) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=181019news01&n=5)
* * *
[Support My Faith Votes with your tax deductible donation.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66idsHszZ_cNjdrkrk6Ct22R5LqpO-pYuvVIOOj4RsxM_Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=181019news01&n=6) _My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._

subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
With your support, we were able to hit our most aggressive goal yet.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379584/7ab0e2c4/7e10ebf2/349867e4/3648413748/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ10198A") Friend -- we did it! Thanks to hundreds of grassroots donors, we were able to hit our final mid-month goal. This campaign is in an all-out sprint to Election Day, and in the hustle it can be easy to lose sight of what we are fighting for. That's why hearing from my team this morning that we hit our goal was a great reminder of what this campaign is about: It's about bringing quality, affordable healthcare to all people in Maryland. It's about fully funding our schools, and helping young people afford college no matter the financial situation of their family. It's about solving the opioid crisis, and stopping the epidemic that has raged in our state under the current administration. It's about the issues that matter to real people, people just like you. [**We are built by you, for you. With only 18 days until November 6, and six days until folks in Maryland start casting their ballots during early voting, I need you to stand with me now more than ever. Will you chip in $5 or more today?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379584/7ab0e2c4/7e10ebf2/349867e4/3648413748/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ10198A") Thanks for being a part of this movement, Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379584/7ab0e2c4/7e10ebf2/349867e4/3648413748/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ10198A")

body:
I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about two races in Virginia that are very important to me: ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek --

I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about two races in Virginia that are very important to me: [Abigail Spanberger's campaign in Virginia's 7th District and my friend Tim Kaine's run for re-election to the Senate.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1021/3e0906/77da7954/3e37f4a9/3778722179/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-spanberger-split?refcode=20181019_1_FR_JB_AS-split-ldnd-sendwide&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Abigail+Spanbergerrsquos+campaign+in+Vir&utm_campaign=20181019_1_FR_JB_AS-split-ldnd-sendwide&source=20181019_1_FR_JB_AS-split-ldnd-sendwide")

Abigail is now in a toss-up race against the entrenched Republican incumbent she's challenging and Tim is fending off nasty attacks from his extreme Trump-backed opponent. These last few weeks are sure to be grueling, but we're going to need Abigail and Tim to come out on top. And I'm going to fight to help them do that.

**So I 'm asking, will you make a first contribution of $10 if you haven't already to send a donation to both Abigail and Tim before their critical October deadlines?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1021/3e0906/77da7954/3e37f4a8/3778722179/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-spanberger-split?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181019_1_FR_JB_AS-split-ldnd-sendwide&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181019_1_FR_JB_AS-split-ldnd-sendwide&source=20181019_1_FR_JB_AS-split-ldnd-sendwide")

---
Now folks, I know a thing or two about winning in Virginia -- Barack and I spent a lot of time there in 2008 and 2012. And I would argue right now, approaching the end of October, is the most important time in this entire election year. Campaigns win and lose based on what they do now.

Abigail and Tim will have to spend the next two weeks running an aggressive turnout program, mobilizing Democrats in the 7th District and being present and positive as they aim to convince undecided voters.

I'm on board. I believe in the plan they have to turn out voters and make sure that Abigail can flip this critical seat and that Tim can send his extreme opponent, Corey Stewart, packing. _But they can 't do this if they don't hit their October goals._

I've known Tim for a long time. He's a good man, a good friend, a good husband and father, and a good fighter. And Abigail is the first former CIA operative and girl scout leader I have had the good fortune to endorse -- and I know there is no one better to serve the 7th District.

**They both will do their part in this election (and in fact, they already have), but right now I need your help to make sure they have the resources they need. So I 'm personally aiming to raise $30,000 for them both through this message -- can you help with that, Derek?**

[Click here to chip in just $10 right away so that Abigail and Tim don't fall short of their ambitious October fundraising goals.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1021/3e0906/77da7954/3e37f4a2/3778722179/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-spanberger-split?refcode=20181019_1_FR_JB_AS-split-ldnd-sendwide&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Click+here+to+chip+in++if+contributionhp&utm_campaign=20181019_1_FR_JB_AS-split-ldnd-sendwide&source=20181019_1_FR_JB_AS-split-ldnd-sendwide")

I hope you know we can't do it without you, Derek.

_Joe Biden_

So I 'm asking, will you make a first contribution of $10 if you haven't already to send a donation to both Abigail and Tim before their critical October deadlines? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Now folks, I know a thing or two about winning in Virginia -- Barack and I spent a lot of time there in 2008 and 2012. And I would argue right now, approaching the end of October, is the most important time in this entire election year. Campaigns win and lose based on what they do now. Abigail and Tim will have to spend the next two weeks running an aggressive turnout program, mobilizing Democrats in the 7th District and being present and positive as they aim to convince undecided voters. I'm on board. I believe in the plan they have to turn out voters and make sure that Abigail can flip this critical seat and that Tim can send his extreme opponent, Corey Stewart, packing. And Abigail is the first former CIA operative and girl scout leader I have had the good fortune to endorse -- and I know there is no one better to serve the 7th District. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Earlier today
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3677/9e00690/53e13d1a/2400656c/882544037/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181019_TownHa_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&source=em18_181019_TownHa_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx")
Friends,

After talking with voters today at a town hall in St. Petersburg, I'm more excited than ever about our opportunity to flip Florida blue on November 6th.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3677/9e00690/53e13d1a/2400656f/882544037/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4571&refcode=em18_181019_TownHa_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181019_TownHa_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=2")
Like my grandmother always said -- when you know better, you do better. And it's time for us to do better in the Sunshine State.

We will fight to make affordable healthcare a right, protect coverage for folks with pre-existing conditions, invest in our public schools, students, and teachers, and clean up our environment.

We will keep our communities safe and stand up to the gun lobby.

We will not stop until every voice is heard at the ballot box.

That's the Florida I believe in. That's the Florida I know is possible.

And if you stand with us -- if you volunteer with us and organize with us and knock on doors with us and make calls with us and, most of all, if you vote on November 6th with us -- then that is the Florida we will build together.

Let's bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

Friend, I don’t need to make up stories or exaggerate to win these debates. Tammy Baldwin’s record is so terrible it speaks for itself.
* She voted against Judge Neil Gorsuch and she sided with the Washington, D.C. elites who obstructed Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation hearings.
* She repeatedly votes to spend our money recklessly and refuses to support tax cuts.
* She's campaigned for a single-payer, government-run healthcare system alongside avowed socialist Bernie Sanders.
* And let's not forget how she did nothing when she learned that veterans were dying due to the care they were receiving at the Tomah VA.

I'm really looking forward to making sure – this one last time – that people know exactly how little Tammy has done for Wisconsin.

[**Can you chip in $50 today to make sure we can share our message before the debate and keep up the heat when it's over?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aacc1f6b1d19416bb0ffab3daa7bcdd7&_e=jxmyr_dy83NRLXmzR_8fw4pFa6X9Uv22f8WKjZ6ZbL8_sI2LcDMsjlGTf4ZPi2g-SnhIGX9DMhQh-IHH5iHfssfPCWVL7LE__inz5jRsoyY9qEOsG_jm9xOA-IkN-7vGqFvAdeRhCwmNQlDTobRt0F_eMuQYvmWfLyZ7KZRHvX0VD0Y-PXbSTcWCfGrJ6An0rzYcXPehsfnydZploLjWoqrQjCFiY0_dZkwKeDL4fFzs_T_Pioso1_ChrEIN2Do40-KoKCbfuxRc3P7kH5q3RcW8DvMU46ZK4pwpHb6XTrJKXa-uYSri6_pu1pQZ3xZesfxDqYERpqcyFw-hwg5QPwTT0bV46jBCXtW_xDKFDCtMT29TNw7l6OG5F8bzl5j3_uSuy4OQD_5HEDrnPxs5w-1MmLxOUCNQBUN3MpBB43ipiHRJD_f7MiGQh5w9U0DO)

clean_body: Our final debate with Tammy Baldwin is TONIGHT and I can't wait. You saw what we did last time! Tammy Baldwin was speechless -- she could not..... Friend, Our final debate with Tammy Baldwin is TONIGHT and I can't wait. You saw what we did last time! Tammy Baldwin was speechless – she could not defend even one of her complete failures. And we were able to turn that debate victory into momentum for our race. This time will be NO different. I will go out there fighting like never before and share my vision with the people of Wisconsin who may not have heard it yet. And friend, I’m not going to go easy on Tammy just because she was not prepared for the last debate. I will not miss the chance to point out why we’re the better choice for Senate. And I want your help to spread the word when the debate is over. Friend, I don’t need to make up stories or exaggerate to win these debates. Tammy Baldwin’s record is so terrible it speaks for itself. She voted against Judge Neil Gorsuch and she sided with the Washington, D.C. elites who obstructed Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation hearings. She repeatedly votes to spend our money recklessly and refuses to support tax cuts. She's campaigned for a single-payer, government-run healthcare system alongside avowed socialist Bernie Sanders. And let's not forget how she did nothing when she learned that veterans were dying due to the care they were receiving at the Tomah VA. I'm really looking forward to making sure – this one last time – that people know exactly how little Tammy has done for Wisconsin. I know Wisconsinites have a critical choice to make this year when it comes to choosing a candidate for Senate, and friend, tonight I'll prove that I'm the only one who can deliver the conservative change the Senate so desperately needs. I hope you have a chance to tune in and watch! And please, chip in now to make sure EVERYONE sees exactly what we have to say TONIGHT. Thank you for all of your support. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Erin Dolan
subject: Got plans this weekend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Hey friend, got plans this weekend?

Across the state, volunteers are coming together this weekend. We are talking with friends, family, and neighbors about Senator Bob Menendez and the fight to protect New Jersey.

If we are going to put a real check in place against Donald Trump's recklessness, we need to not only win seats but hold every single seat we currently have.

And right now, Senator Menendez is up against a Trump loyalist and self-funder who made his fortune price-gouging cancer patients on the cost of life-saving medication. We cannot allow our opponent to use his money to buy this seat and prevent us from putting a stop to Donald Trump.

[**Help us win this race on November 6th by committing a little time this weekend to join our field team in talking with voters. It 's easy, fun, and a great way to help us fight and win on Election Day.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce1/3af3c5d/39a239cb/4ec303c9/1805301363/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/volunteer?gpsid=5_73_4586&source=em18_181019_VOL_gotv_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181019_VOL_gotv_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+Help+us+win+this+race+on+November+6th+by")

They are our ears and eyes in neighborhoods across New Jersey, and their work is vital to winning this race.

You can help by knocking on doors and talking to voters in person if you live in the state, or you can make phone calls from your couch or dining room table, no matter where you live. We will provide the training and anything you might need.

[**Do you have some time this weekend to make some calls or knock on some doors? Sign up to join our field team today and help us win on November 6th.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce1/3af3c5d/39a239cb/4ec303cd/1805301363/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/volunteer?gpsid=5_73_4586&source=em18_181019_VOL_gotv_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181019_VOL_gotv_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5+-+Do+you+have+some+time+this+weekend+to+ma")
